emails.subject: Haywood Transaction
emails.body: Haywood Transaction I have reviewed the latest revisions to the two amendments that are being contemplated for this deal. They should be signed either today or tomorrow. I assume that you would prefer that I remain responsible for these for the next day or so (and get them signed). If this is not the case, please advise. Stuart
